rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CLYDE C. GREENE, JR. RESIDUAL TESTAMENTARY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/28/19 for an appearance. Issue is whether the petitioner can be appointed successor trustee without any nominations (based on the absence of objections alone) and if bond should be waived, when the order creating the testamentary trusts waived bond for "any trustee hereunder." The ages of the two grandchildren should be set forth; if they are not yet 21 years old.
